meanings.definition: fail to agree with; be in violation of; as of rules or patterns
examples: This sentence violates the rules of syntax

meanings.definition: act in disregard of laws, rules, contracts, or promises
examples: violate the basic laws or human civilization

meanings.definition: violate the sacred character of a place or language
examples: violate the sanctity of the church

meanings.definition: force (someone) to have sex against their will
examples: The woman was raped on her way home at night

meanings.definition: destroy and strip of its possession
examples: The soldiers raped the beautiful country
